title: Voltage Tester VD200, 12V-1000V/48V-1000V Dual Range Non-Contact Electric Tester, Sensitivity Electrical Voltage Pen Indicator light with NCV, Flashlight, Buzzer Alarm, Wire Breakpoint Finder
features: 【 Non-Contact Test】: NCV inductive probe for AC voltage; Just place the tip near the terminal board, outlet, or power cord. The live wire detector can detect the live or neutral wire.

【Volatge Alarm】: It can send out audible alarms with a light flash. When the higher the sensed voltage is, or closer to the Live wire, The indicator light turns red and beeps at a higher frequency. Opposite, Close to the natural wire, or far away from the voltage device, the indicator light turns orange with low-frequency beeps.

【Dual Range】: (12-1000V AC / 48-1000V AC) for more sensitive and flexible measurements. Press the "H/L" button to adjust sensitivity and adapt the low range for Doorbells, thermometers, fans, printers, etc.
【Safe Certifications】: Conforms to IEC61010-1 rated, CAT III 1000V CAT IV 600V, CE certification; double insulated ensures safe testing.

【Convenient Design】: LED flashlight for working in dark conditions; Low Power Indicator when battery voltage is below 2.5V; Auto Power Off after 3 minutes without operation could help save power; Tiny size and pen hook allows you to carry it in your shirt pocket. We offer a 36-month after-sale service, please contact us if you have any concerns.
